title: Sidebar Layout

statement.markdown:
Create a simple sidebar layout with navigation and content area
The sidebar should take up 20% of the screen width and have a fixed position
The content area should take up the remaining 80% of the screen width and be scrollable
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling and make sure the layout is responsive

constraints: Use a single HTML file for the layout
Use Tailwind CSS as the styling library
The layout should work on screens with a minimum width of 1200px
The sidebar should be visible on all screens
The content area should be scrollable on screens with a width less than 1200px
